word: H4173 - מֹורַג - môwrag - mo-rag' - Threshing instrument

sections.paragraph:
Original: מרג מורג

Transliteration: môrag môrag

Phonetic: mo-rag'

BDB Definition:

  1. thresher, threshing-sledge

Origin: from an unused root meaning to triturate

TWOT entry: 1165

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
